title: Artificial Christmas Picks 6Pcs, Glitter Pine Branches, Berry Picks for Wreath Making and Floral Arrangement, Pine Cones Stems for Christmas Decorations, Gold
features: Gold Artificial Berry Pine Stem Set - You will receive 6 Christmas berry branches, each decorated with glittering berries, real pine cones and artificial holly leaves. This artificial gold berry pine branch measures approximately 35cm in length.

Durable & Reusable - Artificial berry stems set are made of high-quality materials and exquisite craftsmanship. Each fake branch has berries with wire stem wrapped in florist tape. Not easy to break or rust, so you can enjoy it for years to come.

Christmas Decoration - These Christmas picks are nice to wreath making, Christmas tree picks, Christmas centerpiece, Christmas gift wrapping, Xmas garland DIY, Christmas floral arrangements, holiday craft making, Christmas socks decor and more.

Widely Use - It's not only use for Christmas, but also for others. Faux berry and green decorative plant picks for wedding reception centerpieces, buffet centerpiece, table setting, flower arrangement, vase or canister bouquet of flowers or party favors.

Easy Care - These faux pine picks have colourfast pine branches and artificial greenery decorated with golden berries. No sunlight, watering, pruning or other care required【Reach to "KARBRING" for original WARRANTY!!!】
